form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months ran last of 11 at this track on March 21 over 1200m, 15 len behind Cheonmahoryeong with 52.5kg at $52. Previously second-up 8th of 10 at this track on October 4 over 1300m, slow going 12 len behind Wonderful Socks carrying 55kg at $9.50. Must improve significantly.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 4th of 11 at this track on March 14 over 1400m, 9 len behind Raon Sniper carrying 54.5kg at $2.90. The start before that held ground to the line 3rd of 11 at this track on February 15 over 1300m, 9 len behind Jiljuui Yeowang carrying 54kg at $1.90. An inside barrier is a big advantage. Winning prospects.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Resuming after a three months break. Not seen since she finished last of 11 at this track January 11 over 1800m, 50 len behind Myeong Power carrying 53.5kg at $2.70. On debut second of 9 at this track July 12 over 1000m, 5 len behind Naol Pass carrying 53.5kg at $1.90. A big run will not surprise.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and hung out for the major part of the race.
Bumped at start when shifting in.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 34 day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 11 at this track on March 8 over 1300m, slow going 3.5 len behind Grace Day with 55kg at $6.20. The run before that 4th of 11 at this track on January 10 over 1300m, 3 len behind Royal Socks with 55kg at $7.20. Solid prospects and a good alley doesn?t hurt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in at the start, crowding a runner.
Shifted in at start. Crowded inwards near 900m buffeted and struck rail.

form.formComment: At the latest run 8th of 11 at this track on March 22 over 1300m, 13 len behind Young Fighter carrying 52.5kg at $29.50. The start before that 8th of 11 at this track on March 8 over 1300m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Grace Day with 52.5kg at $33.40. Out of his depth.

form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 10 at this track on March 14 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Blue Rain carrying 52.5kg at $3.10. The race before that settled back and ran on when 8th of 11 at this track on February 7 over 1300m, 13 len behind Donkey Play with 54kg at $5.10. Not far from winner at her last appearance and rates highly.

form.formComment: Most recently settled back and ran on when 8th of 10 at this track on March 14 over 1200m, 8 len behind Blue Rain carrying 52.5kg at $34.90. The run before that eased back early on 7th of 10 at this track on February 1 over 1200m, 7 len behind Seomdolmoru carrying 52.5kg at $92.30. Take on trust.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 41-day let-up. Last start favourite; won by 6 len at this track March 1 over 1200m defeating Raon The Tony carrying 54kg at $2.20. The start before that gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 11 at this track on January 17 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Maeum Hana with 54.5kg at $19.40. Can go on with the job.

form.formComment: Entire back from a spell of three-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 11 at this track December 28 over 1200m, soft track; 9 len behind The Sun Bulsajo carrying 53kg at $5. Previously first up; third of 11 at this track April 13 over 1200m, 2 len behind Race Rose carrying 57kg at $7.10. Expected to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped at start losing ground then raced wide.

form.formComment: Last start 9th of 11 at this track on March 15 over 1300m, 12 len behind Concord Blue carrying 54.5kg at $9.40. The race before that 4th of 11 at this track on February 15 over 1400m, 9 len behind General Wind carrying 53.5kg at $5. Will need to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lay inwards shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of nine months. Finished off last preparation when last of 11 at this track July 26 over 1200m, 22 len behind Joy Light carrying 52kg at $43.50. When resuming last campaign ran last of 11 at this track May 3 over 1200m, 22 len behind Flying Lion with 52kg at $19. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung outwards early in the race.
Lost its position between 750m, and turn into the straight.
